inputs.text: Bahut bukhaar hai, sar dard kar raha hai, 5-saal ka bachha hai, bahut rota hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Non-specific symptoms of fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache can be initial symptoms, but more specific symptoms are needed for diagnosis

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhaar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic symptoms

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Similar symptoms, but joint pain is more typical

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Non-specific symptoms, but could be a viral infection

inputs.text: Bukhaar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai
inputs.image_desc: red rash on arms and chest

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Classic symptoms of Dengue: fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Rash and bleeding gums are not typical of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria does not typically present with rash and bleeding gums

inputs.text: Abhi bhi bahut kamjori hai, dehydration ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Recovery from Dengue can be prolonged, with persistent weakness

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as symptoms are more consistent with Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as symptoms are not consistent with Malaria
